torch_pattern: x = x.view(new_shape)  # zero-copy metadata reshape, e.g. x.view(h, w, d); x.view(d * merge_size**2, -1); x.view(B*S, E)

config_template.notes: shape may contain a single -1 inferred dim; total element count must be preserved; non-tile-aligned reshapes require ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT input (call sites wrap view in to_layout(ROW_MAJOR) ... to_layout(TILE))

applicability_notes: torch_pattern_source: call_sites (ttnn.view used as 1:1 replacement for torch.Tensor.view at each site; no registered golden/test source provided); constraints: ['metadata-only when last-dim/page size compatible; otherwise must be preceded by ttnn.to_layout(x, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT)', 'element count invariant', 'frequently fused into chains: to_layout(ROW_MAJOR) -> view -> permute/transpose/to_layout(TILE)']

placement_observations.size_descriptor: small decode heads tensor [1, 8, 8, 128] (q/k heads, batch=8, n_heads<=8, head_dim=128)
placement_observations.source: llama-family attention decode QK-norm path: to_layout(ROW_MAJOR) immediately precedes ttnn.view([1,8,8,128] <-> [1,1,64,128])

memory_config.layout: TILE (converted via to_layout immediately after view)

placement_observations.source: attention decode: view output is re-tilized (to_layout TILE) and its memory_config captured as reshape_intermediate/output mem cfg

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode q activations [1, padded_bsz, num_heads_local, qk_head_dim] (bsz~32, head_dim=192)

memory_config.shard_spec_template: HEIGHT_SHARDED, ShardOrientation.ROW_MAJOR (shard spec constructed inline at call site)

DeepSeek MLA wo path: untilize -> experimental.view(1,1,bsz//mesh_cols,num_heads*v_head_dim) -> to_memory_config(L1) -> all_gather_async
